name: TC4 Bellows + Wand/Aura Node Repair
changes: Added real bellows block with horizontal facing
Crucible counts adjacent bellows facing it and heats faster
Wand sneak-use spills crucible remnants like TC4 spillRemnants
Wands charge only primal vis from aura nodes
Aura nodes store base aspects and regenerate toward base primal values
Aura node stability/scanned state now loads from NBT

validation.gradle_build: not run in sandbox because Gradle wrapper cannot download services.gradle.org without internet
